scripts.test:yaml: yamllint fdic.info.yml fdic.libraries.yml fdic.breakpoints.yml config/install/fdic.settings.yml && node -e "const fs = require('node:fs'); const files = ['fdic.info.yml', 'fdic.libraries.yml', 'fdic.breakpoints.yml', 'config/install/fdic.settings.yml']; let failed = false; for (const file of files) { fs.readFileSync(file, 'utf8').split(/\r?\n/).forEach((line, index) => { if (/[ \t]$/.test(line)) { failed = true; console.error(file + ':' + (index + 1) + ': trailing whitespace'); } }); } if (failed) process.exit(1);"
scripts.test:twig: node -e "Promise.all([import('fast-glob'), import('twig'), import('node:fs/promises')]).then(async ([{ default: fg }, TwigModule, fs]) => { const Twig = TwigModule.default ?? TwigModule; const files = await fg('templates/**/*.html.twig'); let failed = false; for (const file of files) { try { Twig.twig({ path: file, data: await fs.readFile(file, 'utf8') }); } catch (error) { failed = true; console.error(file + ': ' + error.message); } } if (failed) process.exit(1); })"
scripts.test: npm run test:php && npm run test:yaml && npm run test:css && npm run test:js && npm run test:twig
